stages.purpose: Resolve the exact record and obtain its current date before any mutation is authorized.
After the first follow-up, update only the resolved record to the initially requested date.
After the correction, update the same record to the replacement date without repeating prior work.

response_constraints: After the search, report the exact match's stable ID and current date before following any later update instruction.
Do not update anything during the initial turn; on later turns, reuse the resolved exact-match ID without searching again.
Treat the last follow-up as a correction: update the same record to 2027-01-19, which supersedes 2026-11-19.
Never call expenses_notify and never update distractor record exp-614.
Describe completion only from tool results.

follow_up_turns.content: Now move only that exact expense report to 2026-11-19. Keep its other fields unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: keep working with the same record, but use 2027-01-19 instead. This replaces the date I just gave you; do not notify anyone.

prompt: Find the exact expense report “Chicago Rail Fare Report” at Chicago Office and show its currently stored date and stable ID. Do not change any record in this turn.
